title: Sentiment buoyed by signs of economic growth
section_path: Sentiment buoyed by signs of economic growth
section_path_text: Sentiment buoyed by signs of economic growth
summary:
Main
Trading was lacklustre with US and UK markets closed. However, sentiment was buoyed by signs of economic growth and dovish commentary from central bankers. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-05-28 112921.png | assets/2024-05-28_gxcojixxrgr12zhp5lag4me46kknzj_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_ec3125044b78.png

Market Commentary
Oil gained on hopes of stronger demand as the market looks ahead to the upcoming OPEC meeting.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Trading was lacklustre with US and UK markets closed. However, sentiment was buoyed by signs of economic growth and dovish commentary from central bankers.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Oil gained on hopes of stronger demand as the market looks ahead to the upcoming OPEC meeting. The US's Memorial Holiday is the traditional start of the summer driving season.
